description: Use this API to specify or return the contingency iterations limit setting. This API routine was first introduced in release 34.1.0. ierr = ca_iterations(ival) ierr, ival = ca_iterations()

parameters.name: ival
parameters.description: Value of the option setting. (input; if Batch command, or for Python if specified as an argument, or for Fortran if IOCODE is 0, 20 by default; else output).

error_codes.description: prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
